title: A silver star-like UFO was spotted by three people in Brasília-DF [1994]
excerpt: AUG 8th, 1994. Time: 18:54. Duration: 30 seconds. In the city of Brasilia, Distrito Federal, three people spotted an unidentified flying object at high altitude in the shape of a silver star. According to the witness who reported the sighting to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], the UFO was flying “very fast” towards the North. […]
text_preview:
AUG 8th, 1994. Time: 18:54. Duration: 30 seconds. In the city of Brasilia, Distrito Federal, three people spotted an unidentified flying object at high altitude in the shape of a silver star. According to the witness who reported the sighting to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], the UFO was flying “very fast” towards the North. The sighting was carried out in a partially cloudy sky and with the naked eye. There were no reports of photographs or footage taken of the event.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não I
summary: Three witnesses in Brasília observed a silver star-shaped UFO flying very fast northward for 30 seconds on Aug 8, 1994.
